title: elatostema rhizomatosum
intro: Elatostema rhizomatosum, also known as creeping elatostema or climbing shield fern, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema rhizomatosum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a decoction or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to make teas, infusions, and topical remedies.
